description: Sound-alike distractor + control clips to measure recognition-bias false fires.

clips.text: I need to get up early tomorrow
did you get up on time this morning
he could not get up this morning
we watched a bright flare light up the cloudy sky
the cloud was there when we looked up
a solar flare lit up the cloud cover
our local communities came together
the youth communities need more support
small communities often work harder
what type of script did you use
that is the type of script I like
any type of script works fine here
we are gonna have a great time
I am gonna have another coffee soon
they are gonna have a party tonight
please read us the final results
he read us a bedtime story
can you read us the menu please
click the text field above the button
leave the text field empty for now
the text field turned red suddenly
review the whole code base before merging
we moved the code base to a new server
keep the code base clean and simple
